description: Stage 2 verification steps (TypeScript + Jest + ESLint). build compiles ALL packages in dependency order (tsc); lint runs ESLint over all TypeScript (every PR must be lint-clean — and the Stage 4 guardrail blocks eslint-disable, so lint errors must be genuinely fixed, not suppressed); test runs Jest on the affected packages (${filter} = changed package + its dependents).

jest.description: Jest upgrades most often break tests; run tests first for fast feedback, then lint and build.
